name: node-pify
title: node-pify
description:
promisify a callback-style function
pify permits ont to transform a callback-style function into a
promise-style function. In comparison with builtin function `util.promisify`,
pify is faster, supports wrapping a whole module/object, has useful options
and does have a magic behavior for certain Node.js methods.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-pify because promisify a callback-style function.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-pify as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-pify with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-pify --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
